query: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE email IN ('elizabethzolotova777@gmail.com', 'cheikhanas.iaeste@gmail.com'); INSERT INTO messages (fromUserId, toUserId, subject, body, isRead, createdAt) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'elizabethzolotova777@gmail.com'), (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'cheikhanas.iaeste@gmail.com'), 'Test from Yelizaveta to Anas', 'This message is sent FROM Yelizaveta TO Anas to test recipient visibility', 0, NOW());
